theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A soul-food breakfast restaurant requires a warm, inviting, sensory experience. The light theme with warm cream, deep red, gold, and rich brown creates a cozy, homemade neighborhood feel while retaining an upscale brunch aesthetic.

headings.style: Elegant, tight tracking, warm soul-food vibe

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous spacing. Overlapping elements for visual interest. Soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl) to match the comforting food vibe.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Use p-8, p-12, py-20, py-24 for main sections.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, soft ambient shadow (shadow-lg) on hover.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky nav with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-white/80. Must include Call Now CTA and Order Online.
components_strategy.hero: Rotating full-bleed background images with a dark gradient overlay (bg-black/40 to bg-black/60) to ensure the elegant white/gold typography pops. Bottom-centered or floating CTA.
components_strategy.menu_grid: Modern bento-inspired or masonry grid. Image on top (max-h-64 object-cover), text and price below. Hover effect: slight scale up of image.
components_strategy.reviews_wall: Use `react-fast-marquee` for scrolling Google-style review cards. Cards should have a white background, gold stars, and customer avatar.
components_strategy.floating_order_button: Fixed to bottom-right, pulsing gold or deep red, high contrast, linking to DoorDash.
components_strategy.catering_form: Shadcn UI Input, Textarea, and Button wrapped in a clean, elegantly padded card.

animations.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for menu items and features.
animations.steam_effect: CSS keyframes applied to subtle transparent PNGs or drop-shadows on key food items to simulate hot food.
animations.hover_states: Images scale up 105% on hover. Cards lift -translate-y-1.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='order-online-btn', data-testid='catering-submit-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing sections, ensuring overlap and asymmetry where appropriate.
Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3 headings. Ensure tracking is tight.
Implement react-fast-marquee for the Google reviews wall.
Create a sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80).
Use Shadcn components for the Catering inquiry form. Save form data to the DB.
Ensure all text has sufficient APCA contrast against the warm cream/bone backgrounds.
Include a floating Order Online button fixed to the bottom right of the viewport.
Integrate Lucide React icons for the amenities badges (Free Wi-Fi, Wheelchair Accessible, etc.).
